title: Prompt-Shield Signatures Feed (v1 envelope)
description: Schema for the published v1/signatures.json file. Clients fetch this hourly and apply the patterns as detection rules.

$schema.description: Stable URL to this schema, so clients can self-validate the feed.

version.description: Feed major version. Bumped on breaking format changes; v1 is the current schema.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the CI build that produced this file. Must end with 'Z'.

signature_count.description: Number of entries in 'signatures'. CI MUST set this to len(signatures); clients SHOULD assert equality on fetch.

signatures.description: Array of signature objects. Each entry conforms to schema.json (the single-signature schema).
